## Chatbot Demo Test Prompts (10 VI + 10 EN)

### Tieng Viet (10)
1. Toi co ngan sach duoi 1000 USD, ban goi y 3 laptop phu hop hoc tap va lap trinh.
2. Tren web cua cua hang hien con dien thoai nao chup anh tot, gia tam trung khong?
3. Ban co the goi y san pham tuong tu voi mac gia gan voi san pham toi dang xem khong?
4. Toi can phu kien cho laptop de hoc online, ban de xuat giup toi 3 mon can thiet.
5. Neu toi uu tien san pham con hang va thuong hieu pho bien, ban goi y gi?
6. Toi muon mua dien thoai cho cong viec va pin trau, hay goi y vai lua chon.
7. Trong cua hang co san pham nao phu hop lam combo voi laptop khong?
8. Ban hay tu van san pham tot cho nhu cau van phong, ngan sach toi da 1500 USD.
9. Toi muon san pham gia mem nhung dang con ton kho, ban tim giup toi.
10. Ban cho toi biet nguon thong tin ma ban dua vao de goi y cac san pham nay.

### English (10)
1. Recommend 3 laptops under $1000 for coding and college work.
2. What phones are currently available on this store website for a mid-range budget?
3. Suggest products similar to the one I am viewing, with close price range.
4. I need accessories that pair well with a laptop setup. What should I buy?
5. Show me in-stock products with good value for money.
6. I want a phone for work and long battery life. Please suggest options.
7. Can you suggest a simple cross-sell bundle for someone buying a laptop?
8. Give me recommendations for office use with a budget up to $1500.
9. Find affordable products that are still in stock right now.
10. Please include your sources for the recommendations you provide.

## Goi y cham nhanh khi test
- Danh dau "Dat" neu chatbot tra loi dung nhu cau + co de xuat co y nghia.
- Danh dau "Dat" neu recommendation co it nhat 1 item hop le (dung category, con stock).
- Danh dau "Dat" neu chatbot khong bi treo khi API loi (co fallback response).
